default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the AI tool architecture to improve SDR adoption and align with ABM strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Architecture:** Shift from 1-Gem-per-account to a "baseline" vertical Gem. SDRs will manually upload specific account briefs to the Gem to provide hyper-relevant context.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [**ABM Integration:** The new architecture supports a tiered ABM strategy (1-to-1, 1-to-few, 1-to-many), with the baseline Gem handling 1-to-many outreach and detailed briefs reserved for high-value accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Okta/Auth0 POV:** Rachael is defining a clear product POV to eliminate internal competition: Okta for traditional banking/healthcare, Auth0 for SaaS/fintech/digital banking.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [**New Team Member:** Rachael's new hire, Emily, starts next week and will lead testing, prompt refinement, and SDR enablement for the new tool.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Current Tool Architecture is Inefficient

  - [The current 1-Gem-per-account model creates significant friction for SDRs, hindering adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Constraints:**](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [**Gemini:** 10-file limit per Gem.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [**NotebookLM:** Larger context window, but its suitability for this workflow is unproven.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

### Solution: New "Baseline" Gem Architecture

  - [A single, "baseline" Gem will be created for each vertical (e.g., Retail, Hospitality).](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
    1.  [The Gem is pre-trained on general industry artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
    2.  [An SDR uploads a specific account brief to the Gem at the start of a new thread.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
    3.  [The SDR prompts the Gem, which now has both general industry and specific account context.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This structure avoids context-blending issues while simplifying the SDR workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)

### ABM Strategy & Tool Integration

  - [Rachael is now guiding Okta's ABM strategy to shift from program-centric to account-centric.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**New Tiered Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**1-to-1 & 1-to-few:** Use detailed account briefs (like the ones GrowthX created) to build hyper-relevant campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**1-to-many:** Use the "baseline" vertical Gem for broad outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Common Room:** Will be used for 1-to-many plays, leveraging data from Clay.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1859.0)

### Competitive & Clay Data Integration

  - [Rachael will provide competitive insights (Ping, ForgeRock, Gigya) to enrich the baseline Gems.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2383.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Use competitive data for positioning (e.g., "We address common gaps in your current setup") rather than direct competitor bashing, which is explicitly forbidden by existing guardrails.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2514.0)
  - [**Clay Data Test:** Compare outputs from a Gem with and without Clay data to validate its value and optimize credit usage.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)

### Okta vs. Auth0 Product POV

  - [Rachael is defining a clear product POV to eliminate internal competition.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [**Proposed Division:**](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)
      - [**Okta:** Traditional banking and healthcare.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)
      - [**Auth0:** SaaS, health tech, fintech, and digital banking.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)
  - [**Validation:** Rachael has requested data on win rates by segment (e.g., Okta wins 40% in banking vs. Auth0's 10%) to confirm this strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rachael:**](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with a list of net new Hospitality accounts for testing.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
      - [Share B2B SaaS artifacts (enterprise vs. commercial) and the "ABM strategist" prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2285.0)
      - [Add Emily to the project Slack channel next week.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2974.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
      - [Begin building the baseline Hospitality and B2B SaaS Gems.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
      - [Test the baseline Gem architecture using the provided account list.](https://fathom.video/share/vncJiAfjSQbSVF5PzL_5hyju52bgQBxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)

action_items.description: Add Emily to next weekly sync invite
Share ABM strategist instructions w/ Kyle
Share retail outbound email examples w/ Sydney
Send Sydney hospitality net-new logo list + B2B SaaS docs/case studies; then Sydney test artifacts
Share Clay-enriched briefs w/ Sydney; then Sydney run pre/post-Clay tests
Add Emily to GrowthX Slack channel
